compiled_state.title: Update test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh and .test-index to use root INSTALL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Implementation Steps
1. In `tests/scripts/test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh`, function `test_install_doc_optional_plugins_section` (around line 319):
   Change: `local install_file="$DSO_PLUGIN_DIR/docs/INSTALL.md"`
   To:     `local install_file="$REPO_ROOT/INSTALL.md"`
   REPO_ROOT is already defined at line 19 of that file as `$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR" && git rev-parse --show-toplevel)`.
2. In `.test-index`:
   a. REMOVE the stale entry (the reinstall-hooks tests do not test INSTALL.md content):
      `plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md:tests/scripts/test-reinstall-hooks-config-paths.sh,tests/scripts/test-reinstall-hooks.sh`
   b. ADD new entry mapping root INSTALL.md to the test that validates it
      (fuzzy match fails: "installmd" is not a substring of "testnounguardedpluginrefssh"):
      `INSTALL.md: tests/scripts/test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Old path removed from test: `grep -q 'DSO_PLUGIN_DIR/docs/INSTALL' tests/scripts/test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh` returns exit 1
  Verify: ! grep -q 'DSO_PLUGIN_DIR/docs/INSTALL' tests/scripts/test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh
- [ ] New root path present: `grep -q 'REPO_ROOT/INSTALL\.md' tests/scripts/test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh` exits 0
  Verify: grep -q 'REPO_ROOT/INSTALL\.md' tests/scripts/test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh
- [ ] Stale .test-index entry removed: `grep 'plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md' .test-index` returns exit 1
  Verify: ! grep -q 'plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL\.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] New .test-index entry added mapping INSTALL.md to test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'INSTALL\.md.*test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs\.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] `bash tests/scripts/test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh` exits 0 (root INSTALL.md exists from story 3028-d955)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py

comments.body: AC amendment: After updating test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh to check root INSTALL.md, verify that the test_install_doc_optional_plugins_section function will pass against the actual root INSTALL.md content (created by story 3028-d955). The test checks for: (1) 'Optional Plugins' section heading, (2) presence of 'feature-dev', 'playwright', 'error-debugging' plugin names. Run 'bash tests/scripts/test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh' and confirm these assertions pass. If root INSTALL.md lacks these sections, coordinate with story 3028-d955 owner to ensure the content migration is complete before committing.
comments.author: Test
